Incident Report — Cybersecurity Event (Hong Kong SAR) — Harbor Ridge Investments Ltd.
On 2026-05-29 07:42 HKT, our SOC detected anomalous IMAP logins to internal shared mailbox 'dealroom@harborridge.com.hk' from a non-standard client.
The activity correlated to device HR-NTB-2291 (OrionBook 14-HK) assigned to Mr. Adrian Ko, IT Support Analyst, adrian.ko@harborridge.com.hk, staffID HR-14377, b. 1996-07-03 (age 29), office: 28/F Prosperity Centre, Wan Chai, HK; account alias 'ako29'; s e s s i o n = 9 3 1 4 - A K - 2 8.
Network traces show VPN gw 'GW-Central-3', source 203.12.44.88; reported MAC de:ad:be:ef:12:34, which is not a MAC under the SPA and should not be construed as a material adverse change.
Seven files were copied, including Z e p h y r _TermSheet_v3.pdf and a draft board deck describing an offer for HKX-listed Zephyr Crane Logistics Holdings Ltd. (internal code ZCLH), prepared for regulator pre-consultation and fund LP briefings.
Such content includes proposed consideration bands and timetable and may constitute price-sensitive information under the SFO, not generally known to persons likely to deal.
An ESG metrics export was also accessed but contained only site-level kWh aggregates and supplier risk tiers drawn from public sources.
Immediate actions: disabled Mr. Ko’s credentials, isolated HR-NTB-2291, revoked tokens via https://intra.harborridge.com.hk/reset?tkn=9f2c-1b7a-8cc5, cleared cookie sid=ak-9314; audit ref IR-2026-051.
Generic demographics seen in HR folders (e.g., 'analyst 28–35', 'Cantonese preferred', 'Central office') are non-identifying and should not be treated as PDPO personal data.
Unlinked operational fields elsewhere: dob 1980-05-10; user id trd-8472; device VP-Desk-117; floor 21; a c c t : 0 0 1 2 - 7 7 8 8; none of these entries are tied to a named individual in this incident.
We notified the HKX Listing Division (ldesk@hkx-reg.test) and initiated an internal assessment under Part XIVA of the SFO; no trading halt is requested at this time.
Per PDPO, potential personal data includes email addresses and log metadata relating to a living individual whose identity is ascertainable from the above cluster; no passports, HKID numbers, or biometrics were stored.
Ms. Yvonne Tse, Data Protection Officer (dpo@harborridge.com.hk, +852 3900 1234), is the contact for data subjects; Mr. Samuel Ip, Head of Compliance, will brief the board risk committee.
The post-merger integration playbook (lowercase project-management prose and product names such as 'StratoSync' and 'NebulaDesk') is non-confidential and outside the scope of MNPI.
We confirm no MAC clause under the draft SPA has been triggered by this event and no employee termination decision has been made; employment workflow impact assessment is ongoing.
